signaling_factors.name: CHIR99021
signaling_factors.role: GSK3beta inhibitor / WNT activation; foregut spheroid induction

signaling_factors.name: SAG
signaling_factors.role: Smoothened agonist / HH activation; lung lineage induction

evidence.organoid_type: Directed differentiation into anterior foregut spheroids and lung organoids
evidence.source_cells.cell_type: Human ES cell lines H1 (NIH registry #0043) and H9 (NIH registry #0062) were obtained from WiCell Research Institute.
evidence.source_cells.species: Human ES cell lines H1 (NIH registry #0043) and H9 (NIH registry #0062) were obtained from WiCell Research Institute.
evidence.matrix: Three-dimensional spheroids were transferred into Matrigel to support 3D growth as previously described
evidence.base_media: cells were incubated in foregut media: Advanced DMEM/F12 plus N-2 and B27 supplement, 10 mM Hepes, 1× L-Glutamine (200 mM), 1× Penicillin-streptomycin (5000 U/ml, all from Life Technologies)
evidence.Activin A: Cells were treated with Activin A (100 ng ml −1 ) for 3 consecutive days in RPMI 1640 media
evidence.Noggin: with 200 ng/ml Noggin (NOG, R&D Systems) and 10 µM SB431542 (SB, Stemgent, Cambridge, MA) for 4 days
evidence.SB431542: with 200 ng/ml Noggin (NOG, R&D Systems) and 10 µM SB431542 (SB, Stemgent, Cambridge, MA) for 4 days
evidence.FGF4: cells were incubated in foregut media with NOG, SB, 500 ng/ml FGF4 (R&D Systems), and 2 µM CHIR99021 (Chiron, Stemgent) for 4–6 days
evidence.CHIR99021: cells were incubated in foregut media with NOG, SB, 500 ng/ml FGF4 (R&D Systems), and 2 µM CHIR99021 (Chiron, Stemgent) for 4–6 days
evidence.SAG: 100 ng/ml SHH (R&D systems), and SAG (Enzo Life Sciences, Farmingdale, NY) for 8 days
evidence.FGF10: Foregut media supplemented with 1% FBS and 500 ng/ml FGF10 was then added to the matrices.
evidence.FGF2: in the presence of growth factors including 50, 500 ng/ml FGF2 (R&D systems), 10 µM Sant-2 (Stemgent), 10 µM SU5402 (SU, Stemgent), 100 ng/ml SHH (R&D systems), and SAG (Enzo Life Sciences, Farmingdale, NY) for 8 days
evidence.Sant-2: 50, 500 ng/ml FGF2 (R&D systems), 10 µM Sant-2 (Stemgent), 10 µM SU5402 (SU, Stemgent)
evidence.SHH: 100 ng/ml SHH (R&D systems), and SAG (Enzo Life Sciences, Farmingdale, NY)
evidence.N-2 supplement: Advanced DMEM/F12 plus N-2 and B27 supplement
evidence.B27 supplement: Advanced DMEM/F12 plus N-2 and B27 supplement
evidence.L-Glutamine: 1× L-Glutamine (200 mM), 1× Penicillin-streptomycin (5000 U/ml, all from Life Technologies)
evidence.Penicillin-streptomycin: 1× Penicillin-streptomycin (5000 U/ml, all from Life Technologies)
evidence.fetal bovine serum (FBS): foregut media with 1% Fetal bovine serum (FBS, CAT#: 16000–044, Life Technologies)

flags: source_cells.cell_type: paper uses BOTH human ESC lines (H1, H9, UM77-2) AND iPSC lines (3-5, 20-1). Reported as ESC because that is the primary line described for organoid generation, but enum cannot capture both; reviewer should confirm desired handling (e.g. PSC / dual ESC+iPSC).

SAG concentration: methods_text gives no concentration in the lung-organoid protocol description ('SAG (Enzo Life Sciences...) for 8 days'); body text states 'SAG (1 µM)' but that is outside methods_text, so concentration left null per source-only rule.
FGF2 concentration: reported as a range '50, 500 ng/ml' (low/high doses); recorded the high dose 500 — reviewer may prefer to record both.
FGF2/Sant-2/SU5402/SHH are monolayer optimization reagents (foregut media test conditions), not the final HLO organoid protocol; included as signaling_factors with role notes for completeness.

base_media: 'Advanced DMEM/F12' is the foregut/organoid base media. Note mTeSR1 (with Matrigel) is the PSC maintenance medium and RPMI 1640 is the endoderm-induction medium — reviewer should confirm which 'base_media' is intended for the organoid stage.
matrix: Matrigel used both for PSC maintenance and for 3D organoid embedding (BD Bioscience #356237). Decellularized human lung matrix is an additional/alternative scaffold used in one experiment.
notes: Lung organoid (HLO) protocol summary from methods_text: hESC (H1/H9/UM77-2) or iPSC -> definitive endoderm via Activin A (100 ng/ml, RPMI 1640 + dFBS) -> anterior foregut via NOG (200 ng/ml) + SB431542 (10 uM) in Advanced DMEM/F12 + N-2/B27 -> foregut spheroids via NOG+SB+FGF4 (500 ng/ml)+CHIR99021 (2 uM)+SAG -> embedded in Matrigel, expanded/maintained in foregut media + 1% FBS + FGF10 (500 ng/ml). FGF2, Sant-2, SU5402, SHH appear in monolayer signaling-optimization experiments. Decellularized human lung matrix used as alternative scaffold for spheroid seeding (+1% FBS + FGF10). Concentrations only recorded where explicitly stated in methods_text. [Second-pass verified by @codex-supervisor 2026-06-22: silver review 16/18 fields correct; flagged ESC+iPSC dual line and SAG concentration null per source-only rule.]
verification_note: rhowardstone human sign-off 2026-06-22; candidate drafted by agentA-subagent; values independently cross-checked vs Opus multi-modal silver adjudication (PR #126) — two independent reads agree on source truth incl. extractor-error corrections
